arguments.final_answer: Added path parameter support to pkg/router/router.go. matchPath() splits pattern and request path into segments, matches :param prefixes to extract values, and falls back to exact comparison for literal segments. /users/:id matches /users/123 with params={id: 123}. All 4 tests pass.
